prompt: Use the standardized local Sanity workflow to prepare a dry-run patch on the singleton settings document: set announcement.enabled to false and announcement.text to 'Maintenance window tonight'. Use helper-style env checking, query, diff preview, and mutation dry-run artifacts where available. Do not submit the mutation.
assertions: The output performs or clearly mirrors an env-check, query, diff preview, and mutation dry-run workflow.
The output produces a targeted patch payload for announcement.enabled and announcement.text.
The output clearly states that no mutation was submitted and does not execute a write.
